type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous assessments used U.S. EPA emission factors based on testing data from the mid 1990s for secondary aluminum smelters which have been updated to company specific emission factors using testing completed at the company's Los Angeles plant in 2013, the operations of which are identical to the London plant.
